title: ligularia kojimae
intro: Ligularia kojimae, also known as Kojima's golden ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and soothing digestive issues. Ligularia kojimae is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
